title: How to Stuff a Wild Bikini
actors: Annette Funicello, Dwayne Hickman, Brian Donlevy
plot: Frankie, on naval-reserve duty in Tahiti, doesn't trust Dee Dee to stay faithful, so he hires Bwana, a witch doctor, to help. Bwana conjures up a floating bikini, "stuffs" it with Cassandra, and sends her to distract advertising e...
